subcodes.first_line: Verily, We have adorned the heaven of souls with the sun of trustworthiness, the moon of truthfulness, and the stars of virtuous character, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا زینا سماء النفوس بشمس الامانه و قمر الصدق و انجم الاخلاق ولکن الناس
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @thankfulness; gratitude
